entities.description: The number of times a crop is planted and harvested on the same piece of land in a year)

entities.name: FAST-MATURING CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties that reach maturity quickly, enabling more crops per year)

entities.name: CROP HUSBANDRY

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The pattern of crops grown on a given piece of land over a period of time)

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Techniques used to optimize soil health and water usage for crops)

entities.name: FARM MECHANIZATION
entities.description: The use of machinery to automate agricultural tasks)

entities.name: FARMER-FRIENDLY POLICY SUPPORT
entities.description: Government policies designed to support and benefit farmers)

entities.name: IRRIGATED ECOLOGIES
entities.description: Agricultural environments where water is supplied artificially)

entities.name: RAINFED ECOLOGIES
entities.description: Agricultural environments where water is supplied primarily by rainfall)
